One question on text splitter, if split a large doc or multiple, aggregated docs into multiple segments, is the split result aware of the contextual relationships between segments? if not, we might lose information during later conversations with the model. I want ChatGPT to write support emails (do my job). I know I can fine-tune ChatGPT with my emails from the past, but.... I have thousands of them. Is there a tool to choose typical, yet unique emails, from my dataset? I want a good set of 100 email instead of 10 000. Is there a method or tool for this?

I would stay away from fine tuning. I would rather pick your previous emails which are most closely aligned to the new email you want to answer.

Then ask the LLM to read the new email, use the previous emails as a source of context, then answer the new email
